classChanges.changes:
Berserker Awakening is a class that can deal high damage by repeatedly comboing skills into Flow: Split Shot. However, the long cooldowns on other skills made it difficult to maintain a smooth combo. Furthermore, the damage of the skills used to fill these gaps was lacking.
With this update, we are adding more options to combo into Flow: Split Shot, significantly reducing the cooldown of Flow: Ancient Wave, and increasing the damage of Devastation and Flow: Slugfest to help maintain his damage output even when Flow: Split Shot is unavailable.
Additionally, the defensive effect of Blasting has been improved to help him secure the All AP Increase effect more safely at the start of combat.
Awakening
Blasting
Added Forward Guard during the skill.
Changed Stiffness on attack 1 hits to apply in PvE only.

When Core: Blasting is learned, Stiffness on attack 1 hits applies in PvP as well.
Changed the character to rotate with the camera only up to the attack motion during the skill.
 
Flow: Ancient Wave
Decreased the cooldown: 13 sec → 7 sec.

The Skill Add-on tier has been changed accordingly: 3 → 2.
 
Ground Lifting
Changed the animation when returning to the idle stance after certain skills to appear more natural.
 
Flow: Slugfest
Added a combo into Flow: Split Shot after the skill.
 
Flow: Earth Dividing
Improved the skill to combo better into Blasting.
Changed the damage to apply as independent damage based on the level of Devastation.

Accordingly, Devastation's damage has been increased, and a damage description has been added to Flow: Earth Dividing.

Maehwa Awakening wasn't able to deal Petal Drill's full damage while only using its extra attack. 
To address this, we have moved Petal Drill's extra attack to Tenacious Edge, allowing it to be used independently.
Awakening
Petal Drill
Removed the extra attack and moved its animation to Tenacious Edge.
Decreased the cooldown: 7 sec → 5 sec.

The Skill Add-on tier has been changed accordingly: 2 → 1.
 
Tenacious Edge
Added Super Armor.
Changed Stiffness on hits to apply in PvE only.

When Core: Tenacious Edge is learned, Stiffness on hits applies in PvP as well.
Increased the cooldown: 3 sec → 5 sec (based on Level IV).
Changed the timing at which "Nullified during cooldown" is applied:

Before: After 6 stabbing motions
After: After 3 stabbing motions
Changed the combo timing into Coldsnap to after performing all attacks.
Removed Recover HP per hit.
Moved Petal Drill's extra attack to Tenacious Edge's low stab.

LMB to low stab after Petal Drill, Flow: Frostflower, Flow: Moonlight Dash, or Flow: Tip of an Iceberg.
Adjusted the attack area of the low stab to match its visual effects.
Changed the Critical Hit Rate to not apply during cooldown.
Changed Recover WP based on skill level: 12/13/14/15 → 10/20/30/40.
Fixed the issue where WP did not recover per hit.

HASHASHIN

We have expanded the number of skills that grant an AP Increase buff for Hashashin Succession, allowing him to maintain this buff more consistently during skill combos.
Additionally, although Prime: Aal's Breath was designed to make up a large portion of his combo's damage, it had a long cooldown, and Hashashin could not easily make full use of the Sand Twisters' damage.
To address this, we have reworked the mechanics of Aal's Breath and shifted a portion of its damage to Hashashin's Shamshir skills, increasing their damage output.
Main Weapon, Succession
Absolute: Aal's Breath, Prime: Aal's Breath
Changed the attack mechanism of the skills as follows:
Common\t
Creates Sand Twisters when using the skill. They no longer move toward nearby enemies immediately upon being created (the random movement of the Sand Twisters remains).
Sand Twisters move to the targeted location when using Hourglass of Death, Purge, or Arid Assault.
Sand Twisters that meet another Sand Twister get larger, dealing up to the damage listed below based on its level.
When reaching level 3, it attacks nearby enemies on the spot up to the maximum number of hits then disappears.

Lowest Level\t
Attack damage 800% x1, max 12 hits

Highest Level\t
Attack damage 1840% x1, max 12 hits

PvP Damage\t
59.67%
 
 
Aal's Command
Added All AP +20 for 10 sec when using the skill.

This effect is identical to the effect of Absolute: Hourglass of Death, Absolute: Haladie Throw, and Crown Kick.

For Nova Awakening, we have mitigated the issue where skill cooldowns became misaligned during Accel, making her combos difficult to perform. Instead, the Star's Breath recovery effect from Slicing Ring has been consolidated into Fuse Gravity. To maintain the same level of Star's Breath recovery in PvE, the recovery amount has been adjusted.
Additionally, the pulling effect of the stars summoned by Star's Ring was slightly excessive, so this effect has been adjusted.
Awakening
Slicing Ring
Decreased the cooldown: 10 sec → 8 sec.

Moved the "Star's Breath Recovery +10% when using the skill" effect to Fuse Gravity.

The amount of Star's Breath recovered using Fuse Gravity has been adjusted accordingly: 15% → 25%.
 
Starfall
Changed the cooldown depending on the skill level: 10/10/10 sec → 10/9/8 sec.
 
Star's Ring
Changed so that when stars fuse, they trigger a more powerful pulling effect over a wide area and then disappear without leaving any stars behind.
 
Royal Fencing: Fleche, Accel: Royal Fencing: Fleche
Added Recover 30 SP per hit.
 
Twisted Orbit, Accel: Twisted Orbit
Increased the time the character can rotate with the camera when using the skill forward.

Class Changes
[Sorceress] Dream of Doom - Improved the issue where the skill would not trigger while casted when using Night Crow by consuming Shards of Darkness with insufficient Stamina.
[Tamer] Lightning Burn - Fixed the issue where the attack's hit detection did not match its visual effects.
[Maehwa] Red: Carver - Fixed the issue where All Damage Reduction -20 was applied when using the skill while on cooldown.
[Maehwa] Kerispear Training - Fixed the issue where the skill could not be comboed into Chase after a certain point during the first attack.
[Maehwa] Petal Swirl - Fixed the issue where holding the key inputs triggered different follow-up behaviors depending on whether Core: Petal Swirl was learned.
[Maehwa] Red: Carver - Fixed the issue where damage was not reduced when using the sk

[Witch] Tectonic Block - Fixed the issue where you couldn't use the skill when Stamina was insufficient.
[Mystic] Prime: Sweeping Kick - Fixed the issue where debuff effects were not applied during the skill demo.
[Mystic] Prime: Fist Fury - Fixed the issue where the cooldown was not applied when comboed from certain skills.
[Mystic] Prime: Tornado Kick - Fixed the issue where the description did not mention damage reduction during cooldown.
[Mystic] Fist Fury (I to Absolute) - Fixed the issue where cooldown was not applied when comboing after certain skills.

Hardcore Server
The Black Spirit's energy that once infested the Hystria Ruins is now gone.

The monsters in Hystria Ruins have grown weaker, ready to face adventurers daring enough to enter the Hardcore server.
Adjusted the quest acceptance conditions for some daily quests offered by the Hardcore server NPC Faisal, and changed the quest names accordingly.
